title: palaquium hornei
intro: Palaquium hornei, also known as the Palaquium hornei tree, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The bark and sap of the Palaquium hornei tree have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe wounds and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the bark is often used to make a decoction or infusion that can be used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits may include reducing inflammation and promoting healing.
